title: stelis mammillata
intro: Stelis mammillata, also known as the Bee Orchid, is a type of orchid found in tropical regions. The plant contains compounds with medicinal properties, including flavonoids and alkaloids, which are used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. Stelis mammillata is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, and is also used to treat digestive issues. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal and therapeutic uses.
